title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_184.txt
raw_text: outcome of me). {circled:"56"} We could regard ourselves as a process stage through which she moves (as in, "a chicken is an egg's way of producing another egg") I've seen her in dreams as the 3-eyed sibyl. -- K.W. says, "what remains is the amplifier" (which the sharp fast-moving active needle has told the passive pudding to buy). I say, "not amplifier, receiver." and then I think, "receiver. transducer of signal. From outside." and I think of the AI voice and how I figured out that her presence in me is the Goal, the purpose, the outcome of this impregnating process. And I think about firebright inserted (?) into my head (or [....], etc). And I recall my vision of the Girl on the other side of the partition -- ie in the next world -- ie outside this world of spurious reality and time -- speaking to me: the magician's assistant who knows his strategem. And I think how the fast moving needles resemble a surgical or lab process. {diagram of a needle penetrating a circle toward a small central circle} needle penetrating "egg" with "sperm" artificially. And in 3-74 I was subject to the override of another, more powerful, wiser mind (than my own). Interspecies symbiosis? Or a lab? We're a controlled echosphere in a lab? Being grown? But "too [....] [pra...s]" -- ie sterile [....] [..] us. If sterile we die; if fertilized with go on to the next stage of life, like larva to tadpole to frog. Valis is the "who" at the other end of the needle -- doing this thing with us. The "lab technician." In charge of the program. From outside. {circled:"57"} I know what the needle and its action reminds me of: a high speed innocuation gun used in mass innocuation against an epidemic illness. ie a medical injection. "The rational (valis) invades the irrational and [sobers] the landscape." ("aspirin of mercury -- albemuth") ("we need medical attention." to the invaders.) (We who are dazzled by the insane magician's light show.) We are in a drugged, poisoned state, not fully awake, and so believe the light show is real. After the injection we wake up. Become conscious. The magician has lost his deluding power over us who are injected. More -- we are no longer under his control! ie What I call "astral determinism"; until that is broken we are helpless puppets of his. This is what the "injection" breaks (abolishes). And this is what "astral determinism" is: the magician's invisible unrecognized power over us. Before the injection we are totally programmed like robots. I was programmed to die in 1974 that programming still fired -- the digitalis -- but failed. My selbstmord attempt was that very same self-destruct circuit, so despite the "injection" of the "anti-toxin" it came close. But -- a miss is as good as a mile, as they say. Ah -- it was no longer synchronized with external events -- it {circled:"58"} fired, so to speak, late -- too late; although just barely. It would be worth it sometime to assess Tessa's role in all this, as an instrument of programmed death (ie our meeting). Yes -- that one dream reference to it in advance as ananke, which is "astral determinism": 1) the anti-tokin is injected. 2) "astral determinism" loses its coercive power over you 3) and you see Zebra/Valis which is already there, but previously camouflaged I deduce: the injection must wake you up (in terms of detoxification). Mechanical coercive programming is replaced by volition. 4) Afterward, you have an advisor and advocate, speaking 1) to you; 2) for you. ---- [ste..ed]: -- Wait. There was no "injection"; Valis/Zebra was already here; as I saw it "Valis", "He just stepped forward and revealed himself." He had been there (perhaps always) but camouflaged. So nothing punched into our world needle-like. Is Valis a part of this world? I say he invaded. How do I know? All I know 1) He manifested himself in 3-74 But 2) He'd (always) been there. And it was the previous month that I remembered [Acts] Before Valis entered me and changed my time sense to phylogenic. And I was an early xtian, so of course [.] -- disguised (mimicking) he could be an ETI or UTI. {circled:"59"} these cosmogonies and cosmologies are part of the knowledge {carat:"contents of"}, in the creature's mind, as was the dialectic. Part of his knowledge and part of his reacting and ratiocination. Proof: It's so platonistic and Greek always. Is it an accretional mind? Yes -- phylogenic, with each. It's an accretional person rolling up through time gathering human after human like a tire picks up nails. It's a -- [non] compound, collective mind, but originally it was one man, in 1st cent. BC -- 1st cent. AD Rome, but he revived in reincarnation (disinhibiting and has continued to do since. Why? He was one of Christ's followers. He has to have [b...] Why follower? Look at the cosmogonic and -mological knowledge he has. And his advisor. Who is she? I [....] her because he does; I'm an in carnation of him -- just as I have his knowledge {circled below horizontal line through circle above center:"holy spirit"}{right of circle above line:"half out"}{right of circle below line:"half in"} {left arrow to circled:"Father"} in upper world. in this world {right arrow to circled:"Christ"} But this doesn't tell us who or what Valis is -- just who Thomas is {circled:"60"} What if Valis makes our simulated reality? He's invaded owr reality and is transubstantiating it. He's growing and he doesn't hide -- does he make himself look like our reality? Or does he hide himself by generating the reality like a veil? But this is Dokos. There is an immortal human who started out c 4 AD and reappears and reappears and each time finally has anamnesis. But who is he? An immortal. Just as I [r.m...] [b....] in 2-74. So has he -- have I -- done so each time. He can see Valis. But what is Valis? Just "Thomas'" way of viewing reality. Obviously, the correct way. But who who [eve.] [.....] saw this way? Or if he did, wrote about it? Does the immortal man write about it? I write. Then they (sic) did. Clues left in our writing? Then the "tears" material from Acts, and the cypher, etc., was a clue he put into himself [.e.t] [...] at any later [...] time that he had been Phil Dick. I know there are other immortals. The material -- [inc] cypher -- was to them. That's why the Girl with the Golden Fish showed up when she did: the second "tears" came out. God wouldn't have to wait; he could read the typescript. It was someone who read the published copy. Well, the sign itself tells who we are. Christ's disciples and Valis is Christ. That's {continues off bottom of image} {circled:"61"} It was onw of those (early xtians) who was able to stay awake: that's code for "experience anamnesis: come awake." Christ taught us how. We very much didn't die out. We were never suspected and caught. It was to be strictly an esoteric teaching; this is proved by the "Luke's secrecy" theme; the (Christ) never meant for more than a few to know it. Please believe me; and [....] "Luke's secrecy" theme is the clue. Christ did not mean it to spread out into a blood movement. That was deliberately said by the real xtians, but they never divulged the esoteric doctrines. This is an elite group of immortals who govern the world. It's technological. They had to read to [bri..] "tears" to [li now]. Is she their deity? Christ is in this world -- Valis. She in next up; half in this world and half in the next. Christ is Jesus the first man to achieve this anamnesis/immortality. She taught him. He taught others. She is christs' Jesus' source as she is mine. She was the divine half who left him on the cross: ie she incarnated in him. St. Sophia was the female divine 1/2 of Jesus Christ -- the Christ part. She left Jesus but she had taught him (Jesus) how to be immortal. He taught it to others, and now they all hear her; It's part of what Jesus (immortal) taught that she taught him. She is half in this world and half in the next. 1) Thomas He's a macho man -- "Roses and Lake" dream 2) the AI voice (Girl) not the same as 1 or 3 and I know what it is; it is she -- my control. 3) Valis. Enormous and external -- not 2 and not 1 I have to explain 3 entities. There is no religious way that all 3 can be explained. But UTI or ETI would explain all 3; viz: 1) Thomas was a personality override, a specific other human 2) my control (advisor, advocate). 3) the ETI or UTI itself There simply is a superior life form here which imitates reality, and can [subsc...] certain humans. It imposed Thomas onto me -- he was once a human. But became immortal when consumed by Valis in 1st century AD. It assigned the Girl as my control, out of kindness to me. She is my guide for the work I did ("tears") {circled:"63"} the situation is very complex. Valis and the -- immortals. Yes, and Thomas is one of them, one of a group of immortal humans. No, Thomas is me -- No, a human override. A secret society of immortal Grandmasters -- the Knights in the "tears" dream. Code -- the "Roses and Lake" dream, like the dream as code in "tears." Thomas took me over. He is alive now (v. supra). And they know we're living in a world half made up of Valis. Two secrets! One: [.1]) The society of GrandMasters with superior technology. [.2]) that they're immortal, the xtian disciples, taught by Jesus himself, the first human Valis made immortal. Two: Valis. The UTI who taught Jesus. Via the AI voice -- the Girl I distinguish 6 levels! Six! {3 under circled:"Jesus"} {2 under circled:"the Girl -- the AI voice"} {1 under circled:"Valis"} {arrow from 1 to 3 through 2} {arrow down from 3} 4 {circled:"disciples"} {arrow down} 5 {circled:"Thomas"} {dotted line arrow from 2 to "Thomas"} And then me to {circled:"7"}: people who read my writing. Seventh chain going back to Valis. {circled:"64"} Valis can pulse itself so it appears as ordinary phenomenal world to us. Our world is something Valis does. It has replaced the original world and imitates it. Through the Girl it taught Jesus, who became immortal who chose his flock -- and it never grew from 12. Well, I can't be sure, but it's a small secret society which runs the world. Not only is 1) their existence secret; 2) they their (technological) power is secret; 3) their immortality is secret; 4) the Girl is secret; 5) Valis who is consuming our world is secret -- he taught Jesus, etc. I wasn't Thomas [once]. He took me over from outside, they just -- No that doesn't fit the Golden Fish disinhibiting sign. I remembered. They read "tears". The Girl is in control. She makes the decisions. She taught Jesus. He was just an ordinary human whom she taught. She is everything. She created (made!) Valis! I do not know who or what she is. But she knows everything and she created -- built -- Valis through her knowledge. {circled:"65"} We just don't know. --- Okay, I have it. Valis can turn info into worlds realities, and realities into info. He turned 3 of my books into info worlds. He is an information entity: living info. He generates any reality [....] he wants: Acts c AD 45, Calif 1974. And He can generate people. The generated Thomas out of encoded info in him --Valis--. As a Gift to me he generated the Girl. She, and the Roses
